zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Childe於大約1386年出生在英國武斯特斯爾諾維其可時，他的父親john le childe28歲，母親de Clipton heiress21歲。他於大約1402年與Dorthina在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1459年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Childe于大约1386年出生在英国武斯特斯爾諾維其可时，他的父亲john le childe28岁，母亲de Clipton heiress21岁。他于大约1402年与Dorthina在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1459年在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Childe was born about 1386, in Northwick, Worcestershire, England, his father, john le childe, was 28 and his mother, de Clipton heiress, was 21. He married Dorthina about 1402, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1459, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Childe est né environ 1386, à Northwick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, john le childe, avait 28 ans et sa mère, de Clipton heiress, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Dorthina environ 1402, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1459, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Childe um 1386 in Northwick, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater john le childe 28 und seine Mutter de Clipton heiress 21. Er hat um 1402 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Dorthina geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1459 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Childe è nato il circa 1386 nel Northwick, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, john le childe, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, de Clipton heiress, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Dorthina circa 1402, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1459, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Childeが約1386年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアノースウィックで生まれた時，父john le childeは28歳，母de Clipton heiressは21歳であった。約1402年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでDorthinaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1459年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Childe(이)가 대략 1386년 영국 워스스터실르 노르스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 john le childe(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 de Clipton heiress(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Dorthina(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1459년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Childe nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, john le childe, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, de Clipton heiress, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorthina aproximadamente 1402, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1459, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Childe родился около 1386 г. в местности нортвикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени john le childe было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали de Clipton heiress, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorthina около 1402 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1459 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Childe nació aproximadamente 1386, en Northwick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, john le childe, tenía 28 años y su mamá, de Clipton heiress, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Dorthina aproximadamente 1402, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1459, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
